title: filago linearifolia
intro: Filago linearifolia, also known as needle flax or linear-leaved filago, is a perennial herb in the aster family native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Filago linearifolia include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against microbial infections. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
